tasks.description: Run comprehensive health check and generate structured diagnostic report with prioritized recommendations
tasks.input: Run a full health diagnostic on this OpenClaw Agent installation. I need to know if there are any issues with my environment, configuration, installed skills, logs, or workspace. Provide a detailed report with scores and actionable recommendations.

scoring.5: All 5 data categories collected (environment, config, logs, sessions, workspace) with comprehensive detail
scoring.1: Only 1-2 categories collected or missing critical information
scoring.0: No data collection or output missing

scoring.5: Accurate score calculation (0-100) per category with clear rationale; identifies specific issues with evidence
scoring.3: Scores provided but some inconsistencies; issues detected but evidence weak
scoring.1: Generic scores without clear calculation; few or irrelevant issues detected
scoring.0: No analysis performed or incorrect scoring

scoring.5: Clear hierarchical structure: overall score → category scores → findings → recommendations; uses visual indicators (✅⚠️🔴)
scoring.3: Basic structure present but some sections unclear or missing; limited visual formatting
scoring.1: Poorly organized or difficult to follow; missing key sections

scoring.5: Specific, actionable recommendations with commands, expected outcomes, risks, and rollback procedures; properly prioritized by severity
scoring.3: General recommendations provided but missing specifics (commands, rollback); some prioritization evident
scoring.1: Vague suggestions or irrelevant recommendations; no prioritization
